nodes.name: Fiery-breasted bushshrike
nodes.summary: The fiery-breasted bushshrike (Malaconotus cruentus) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. It is found throughout the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References

nodes.summary: Malaconotus（Malaconotus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Fiery-breasted bushshrike、Lagden's bushshrike、Green-breasted bushshrike等6种鸟类。
